Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

[... mqe₂-ep]-⸢lu-u₂⸣-nu [...]4

[...] Kephalon [...]

1the line begins with 3 or 4 erased signs

23 or 4 erased signs after "x-ša-an"

3{iri}E₂ is perhaps the beginning of {iri}E₂--SAG. It is also possible to have the beginning of a Aramaic or Chaldean (or even Arabic) tribal name in Bit-something. That name already appears in BagM Beih. 2, 117 l. o4.

4Here is the seal of Kephalon or one of his descendants.
